itemLocation.linkage: file://\\HIDOM\D$\Chattanooga biking\Data\Chatt TPL Trails Shape FIle\ChattTrails_TPL_20230515.shp

dataIdInfo.idPurp: Existing, current, and proposed trails in Chattanooga, Tennessee.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: Existing, current, and proposed trails in Chattanooga, Tennessee. Compiled by The Trust for Public Land GIS on 5/16/16. Data may not be accurate and should be used for visualization only.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
